clause.author: Kieran O'Donnell
clause.title: Threshold
clause.p: The threshold of an internal doorway that is subject to Clause 3.1 must—

ol.li: have a height not more than 5 mm if the lip is rounded or bevelled; or

have a ramped threshold that—
does not extend beyond the depth of the door jamb; and
has a gradient not steeper than 1:8; and
is at least as wide as the minimum clear opening width of the doorway it serves.
